name: No witnesses to my business loss from AI Overview - still a case?

mainEntity.name: No witnesses to my business loss from AI Overview - still a case?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, use traffic data as proxy evidence.
acceptedAnswer.description: Circumstantial evidence like analytics suffices if strong.[1] Key factors: Before/after data; market comparisons. Build digital trail. Viable nationwide.
